atoms.semantic_claim: Image Phase 2 pricing uses model-specific per-pixel and minimum fees plus UX step multipliers, and returns executor fee only after Phase 1.

destinations.evidence: Old image Phase 2 model-specific per-pixel pricing is not implemented in the v2 fee crate; current runtime keeps media delivery fail-closed.

atoms.notes: Reclassified from structural_equivalent. Shared fee crate presence is not behavioral proof; the old model-specific pricing branch is absent and must stay blocked.
atoms.required_change: Port old image Phase 2 model-specific per-pixel pricing and associated model-registry reads before enabling this family.

atoms.semantic_claim: Video escrow pricing reserves worst-case max resolution and duration with model-specific pixel-second fees and step and FPS multipliers before long-running video work is admitted.
